title: Deploy
expectation: Use a dedicated manager integration worktree as the integration, release, deploy, and live-validation surface for this process. If a worker-hosted feature branch is the source of truth, first confirm that a focused feature branch exists, then run the worker-feature merge flow to refresh that branch from latest `origin/development`, integrate it through the manager worktree, and push `development` to origin before continuing. After a successful merge into `development`, promote that integrated commit onto `main`, create a release tag from the exact promoted commit, deploy the runtime from the release target, verify runtime revision and version match, perform live health verification, issue a manager-dashboard session URL with `bun run issue:dashboard-session`, perform real browser verification at the public Cloudflare manager dashboard URL using that issued session URL, verify the manager-dashboard screenshot, and complete cleanup or rollback recovery as required.
idlePrompt: If deployment is complete, reply only with 'done: deploy complete'. If you are truly blocked on a missing focused feature branch, user decision, or environment dependency, reply only with 'blocked: deploy blocked'. Otherwise resume the deploy process immediately and perform the next required integration, release, deploy, cleanup, or validation step instead of giving only a status update.
stopConditions: blocked on focused feature branch, user decision, or environment dependency

steps.title: Is there a focused feature branch?

decision.prompt: Is there a focused feature branch?

steps.title: Run `bun run agent:merge-worker-feature -- <feature-branch-name>` to refresh the worker feature branch from latest `origin/development`, stop for worker conflict resolution if needed, create a dedicated manager integration worktree, merge the feature branch there, and push `development` to origin
What is the feature merge outcome?

decision.prompt: What is the feature merge outcome?

options.title: Feature merge requires worker conflict resolution

steps.title: Merge the integrated `development` commit onto `main`, push `main`, and create and push a release tag from that exact promoted commit
Verify the runtime checkout revision match and frontend-backend version match
Issue a manager-dashboard session URL with `bun run issue:dashboard-session`
Perform real browser verification at the public Cloudflare manager dashboard URL using the issued manager-dashboard session URL
Post a screenshot into the chat as a markdown image from the approved `~/temp` image space showing the changes on the manager dashboard at the public Cloudflare manager dashboard URL
What is the manager-dashboard screenshot outcome?

decision.prompt: What is the manager-dashboard screenshot outcome?

options.title: Manager-dashboard screenshot posted into the chat
Manager-dashboard screenshot could not be produced

steps.title: Roll back to an earlier known-good release tag
Continue manager-dashboard screenshot verification until a stable working release is found
Delete the failed release tag locally and on the remote after recovery
Clean up the feature branch and worktree after recovery
Clean up the feature branch and worktree
